TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit ServiceAccountImagePullProfile extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ServiceAccountImagePullProfile>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ServiceAccountImagePullProfile>
Public Class ServiceAccountImagePullProfile Implements IJsonModel(Of ServiceAccountImagePullProfile), IPersistableModel(Of ServiceAccountImagePullProfile)

Docs.summary: Profile for configuring image pull authentication to use service account scoped managed identities for authentication instead of node scoped managed identity (kubelet identity) for authentication to Azure Container Registry. For more information, refer to https://aka.ms/aks/identity-binding/acr-image-pull/docs.

MemberSignature.Value: public ServiceAccountImagePullProfile ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public string DefaultManagedIdentityId { get; set; }
.property instance string DefaultManagedIdentityId
Public Property DefaultManagedIdentityId As String
member this.DefaultManagedIdentityId : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Optional. The default managed identity resource ID used for image pulls at the cluster level. When configured, this identity is used if a Pod’s service account does not explicitly specify an identity for pulling images. If not configured and no identity is specified at service account level, image will be pulled via anonymous authentication.

MemberSignature.Value: public bool? IsEnabled { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<bool> IsEnabled
Public Property IsEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsEnabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Indicates whether service account based image pull is enabled, for which identity bindings are required for the managed identity to be used for authentication. For more information, refer to https://aka.ms/aks/identity-binding-docs.
